code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test20-OCT-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, presence of glucose, bilirubin, and ketones). No signs of urinary infection. Findings suggest possible acute or chronic kidney disease with glycemic disturbances; further nephrological and endocrinological evaluation is recommended.
